query:
ALTER TABLE users 
  ADD COLUMN plan ENUM('fish','reg','shark') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'fish',
  ADD COLUMN monthlyHandsUsed INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN monthlyCoachUsed INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN usageResetDate VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT NULL;
